enemy_templates.name: Pirate Scout
enemy_templates.description: A fast, lightly armed scout vessel. Prefers to flee when outmatched.

moves.name: Light Blaster
moves.description: A quick, low-power blaster shot.

enemy_templates.name: Pirate Raider
enemy_templates.description: A well-armed raider that attacks aggressively and without mercy.

moves.name: Raider Cannon
moves.description: A heavy-hitting cannon favored by pirates.

moves.name: Concussion Missile
moves.description: An explosive missile with area damage potential.

enemy_templates.name: Pirate Heavy
enemy_templates.description: A heavily armored pirate vessel that fights defensively, shielding allies.

moves.name: Twin Turret
moves.description: Dual turret fire.

moves.name: Shield Boost
moves.description: Restores shields and reduces incoming damage.

enemy_templates.name: Smuggler
enemy_templates.description: A nimble smuggler vessel. Will flee rather than fight if given the chance.

moves.name: Concealed Blaster
moves.description: A hidden weapon for emergencies.

moves.name: Chaff Burst
moves.description: Releases chaff to improve evasion.

enemy_templates.name: Patrol Vessel
enemy_templates.description: A well-maintained patrol ship. Fights defensively and hard to negotiate with.

moves.name: Military Laser
moves.description: Standard-issue military laser.

moves.name: Shield Regenerator
moves.description: Restores shields.

enemy_templates.name: Guild Enforcer
enemy_templates.description: A Commerce Guild patrol ship enforcing trade regulations. Well-shielded and methodical.

moves.name: Regulation Laser
moves.description: Standard-issue Guild enforcement weapon.

moves.name: Trade Shield
moves.description: Reinforced shields issued to Guild enforcement vessels.

enemy_templates.name: Guild Dreadnought
enemy_templates.description: A Commerce Guild capital-class enforcer. Heavily armed and drains enemy systems.

moves.name: Trade Battery
moves.description: A devastating broadside from Guild-issue cannons.

moves.name: System Disruptor
moves.description: Drains enemy energy reserves while dealing light damage.

enemy_templates.name: Union Brawler
enemy_templates.description: A rugged Miners' Union combat vessel. Hits hard with improvised mining weapons.

moves.name: Mining Drill Ram
moves.description: A repurposed mining drill used as a close-range weapon.

moves.name: Ore Plating
moves.description: Reinforces hull with compressed ore plating.

enemy_templates.name: Union Crusher
enemy_templates.description: A massive Miners' Union warship built from salvaged mining rigs. Deals devastating damage.

moves.name: Asteroid Hammer
moves.description: A massive kinetic strike from a converted mining arm.

moves.name: Field Repairs
moves.description: Quick hull patching from spare mining materials.

enemy_templates.name: Science Probe
enemy_templates.description: A Science Collective autonomous probe. Drains shields and evades with advanced technology.

moves.name: Analysis Beam
moves.description: A precise energy beam that disrupts shields.

moves.name: Phase Shift
moves.description: Temporarily shifts out of phase, greatly increasing evasion.

enemy_templates.name: Science Sentinel
enemy_templates.description: A Science Collective guardian vessel. Uses advanced technology for damage reduction and accuracy disruption.

moves.name: Neural Disruptor
moves.description: Disrupts targeting systems, reducing enemy accuracy.

moves.name: Energy Barrier
moves.description: Projects an energy barrier, reducing incoming damage and restoring shields.

enemy_templates.name: Frontier Raider
enemy_templates.description: A fast Frontier Alliance strike craft. Relies on speed and precision.

moves.name: Rapid Fire
moves.description: A quick burst of energy bolts from frontier-modified weapons.

moves.name: Thruster Boost
moves.description: Engages afterburners for increased evasion.

enemy_templates.name: Frontier Gunship
enemy_templates.description: A heavily armed Frontier Alliance warship. Fast and devastating with multiple weapon systems.

moves.name: Weapons Barrage
moves.description: Fires all weapon systems simultaneously.

moves.name: Strafing Run
moves.description: A high-speed attack pass dealing moderate damage.

enemy_templates.name: Guild Revenue Cutter
enemy_templates.description: A light Commerce Guild patrol craft. Revenue Cutters enforce trade regulations and inspect cargo manifests. Lightly armed but persistent â€” their job is to detain, not destroy.

moves.name: Regulation Scanner
moves.description: A targeting scan that marks the vessel for enforcement. Disrupts evasive maneuvers.

moves.name: Warning Shot
moves.description: A low-power deterrent blast. Standard Guild enforcement protocol.

enemy_templates.name: Union Picket
enemy_templates.description: A converted mining skiff pressed into convoy escort duty. Small and tough, crewed by miners who decided shooting pirates beats drilling rock. Armed with improvised weapons powered by engines built to haul ten times their weight.

moves.name: Slag Launcher
moves.description: Fires superheated mining slag. Inaccurate but packs a punch.

moves.name: Reinforced Plating
moves.description: Activates compressed-ore hull reinforcement.

enemy_templates.name: Science Surveyor
enemy_templates.description: A Collective research vessel repurposed for patrol duty. High sensor resolution and excellent shields, but minimal weapons. Prefers to scan, analyze, and evade â€” but its analysis beam strips shields with clinical precision.

moves.name: Scan Pulse
moves.description: A focused energy scan that disrupts shield harmonics.

moves.name: Evasion Protocol
moves.description: Engages automated evasion subroutines.

enemy_templates.name: Frontier Skirmisher
enemy_templates.description: A fast Alliance interceptor built for hit-and-run tactics. Light, agile, and crewed by the best seat-of-the-pants flyers in the Expanse. Armed with quick-firing modified weapons that compensate for low power with high accuracy.

moves.name: Quick Burst
moves.description: A rapid volley from frontier-modified blasters.

moves.name: Afterburn
moves.description: Hard thruster burn for evasive repositioning.

enemy_templates.name: Reach Rust Runner
enemy_templates.description: A fast, light harassment vessel built from courier wreckage in the scrapyards of Crimson Reach. Armed with corrosive slug-throwers that eat through hull plating. Its job is to harry and harass, not to stand and fight.

moves.name: Corrosive Slug
moves.description: A corroded metal slug laced with reactor coolant. Eats through shields.

moves.name: Scrapyard Jink
moves.description: Erratic evasive maneuver learned from dodging debris in the Reach.

enemy_templates.name: Reach Wrecker
enemy_templates.description: A medium combat vessel built from salvaged military hulls in Crimson Reach. Equipped with grapple launchers and a reinforced ram prow â€” Reach combat doctrine favors getting close and tearing ships apart for salvage. Why destroy what you can repurpose?

moves.name: Grapple Ram
moves.description: Closes distance and rams with a reinforced prow. Devastating but hard to aim.

moves.name: Hull Ripper
moves.description: Cutting torches repurposed for combat. Strips shields and scores hull.

moves.name: Salvage Plating
moves.description: Welds scrap plating over damaged sections mid-combat.

enemy_templates.name: Reach Dreadwreck
enemy_templates.description: A massive amalgamation of ship carcasses welded into a single hulking combat platform. Slow, poorly shielded, but absurdly durable and bristling with weapons salvaged from a dozen different sources. Each Dreadwreck is unique and terrifying.

moves.name: Scrapyard Barrage
moves.description: Fires every weapon simultaneously â€” a chaotic storm of mismatched ordnance.

moves.name: Toxic Overcharge
moves.description: Vents unshielded reactor exhaust at the target. Damages hull and drains energy systems.

moves.name: Ablative Wreckage
moves.description: Sacrifices outer hull plating to absorb damage and effect emergency repairs.

enemy_templates.name: Freelance Tracker
enemy_templates.description: A fast, lightly armed bounty tracking vessel. Relies on speed to catch targets, but flees when outgunned.

moves.name: Tracking Pulse
moves.description: A precise targeting pulse that reduces evasion.

moves.name: Pursuit Burn
moves.description: Hard engine burn for evasion while closing distance.

enemy_templates.name: Bounty Enforcer
enemy_templates.description: A well-armed bounty hunter ship. Balanced loadout optimized for disabling targets.

moves.name: Disabling Cannon
moves.description: A heavy shot designed to cripple engines and drain shields.

moves.name: Tractor Net
moves.description: Deploys an electromagnetic net that reduces target evasion.

enemy_templates.name: Bounty Vanguard
enemy_templates.description: A heavily shielded bounty hunting vessel. Absorbs punishment while wearing down targets with sustained fire.

moves.name: Suppression Barrage
moves.description: Sustained weapons fire that chips at hull and accuracy.

moves.name: Shield Wall
moves.description: Maximizes shield output and reduces incoming damage.

enemy_templates.name: Bounty Ace
enemy_templates.description: An elite freelance hunter flying a custom interceptor. Extremely fast and accurate â€” almost impossible to outrun.

moves.name: Precision Shot
moves.description: A carefully aimed shot that bypasses evasion. High accuracy, moderate damage.

moves.name: Afterburner Strafe
moves.description: High-speed attack run dealing damage while boosting evasion.

moves.name: Tracking Shot
moves.description: Locks onto the target's engine signature. Unavoidable but lower damage.

enemy_templates.name: Sector Authority Enforcer
enemy_templates.description: A top-tier enforcement vessel deployed by the sector council. Three weapon systems, heavy armor, and zero tolerance for criminals.

moves.name: Authority Lance
moves.description: A devastating directed-energy weapon reserved for sector enforcement.

moves.name: System Disabler
moves.description: Targeted EMP burst that drains energy and shields simultaneously.

moves.name: Pursuit Lockdown
moves.description: Deploys a tracking field that makes fleeing nearly impossible.

enemy_templates.name: Unmarked Raider
enemy_templates.description: A heavily armed raider with military-grade weapons and coordinated tactics. The hull markings have been scrubbed, but the drive core is unmistakably Guild-pattern.

moves.name: Military Blaster
moves.description: A precision weapon with Guild-standard targeting systems.

moves.name: Precision Strike
moves.description: A focused burst that bypasses shield harmonics.

enemy_templates.name: Unmarked Striker
enemy_templates.description: A fast, evasive interceptor running unmarked. The engine signature matches military-spec thruster arrays â€” hardware that doesn't appear on any civilian market.

moves.name: Quick Burst
moves.description: Rapid fire from concealed weapon mounts.

moves.name: Afterburn Jink
moves.description: Military-grade thruster burst that makes the ship nearly impossible to track.

enemy_templates.name: Ledger Vanguard
enemy_templates.description: The Ledger's elite interceptor. Purpose-built from Guild military prototypes, piloted by the Inner Ledger's most experienced operative. Fast, heavily armed, and utterly committed to preventing anyone from reaching the warp gate.

moves.name: Convergence Lance
moves.description: A focused energy weapon derived from gravitational lensing technology. Devastating at close range.

moves.name: Shield Shatter
moves.description: Targeted pulse designed to overwhelm defensive systems.

moves.name: Command Override
moves.description: Activates hardened armor plating and targeting calibration.
